blocks.body: Future Simple: Negatives — will not / won't + V1 w przeczeniach dotyczących przyszłości.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"W przeczeniach Future Simple używamy will not lub won't + V1.","rules":[{"label":"will not / won't","color":"emerald","text":"Pełna i krótka forma mają to samo znaczenie.","example":"I will not wait. / I won't wait."},{"label":"V1 after won't","color":"blue","text":"Użyj formy podstawowej bez to.","example":"She won't be late. / They won't come."},{"label":"Same for all subjects","color":"amber","text":"Won't nie zmienia się w zależności od osoby.","example":"He won't call. / We won't call."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe wzory","intro":"Po will not / won't zawsze używaj V1.","items":[{"label":"Pełna forma","title":"will not + V1","subtitle":"I will not forget. / She will not agree."},{"label":"Krótka forma","title":"won't + V1","subtitle":"We won't be late. / They won't stay."},{"label":"Czasownik be","title":"won't be","subtitle":"It won't be difficult."},{"label":"Kontrast","title":"will come → won't come","subtitle":"Główny czasownik się nie zmienia."}]}

{"title":"2. Twierdzenie i przeczenie","intro":"Porównaj oba wzory.","rows":[{"en":"I will call tomorrow.","ua":"I won't call tomorrow.","note":"will → won't"},{"en":"She will be late.","ua":"She won't be late.","note":"won't be"},{"en":"They will come with us.","ua":"They won't come with us.","note":"same V1"}],"warning":"Nie mów will don't, won't to go ani won't goes."}

{"title":"3. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Użycie don't po will.","wrong":"❌ I will don't go.","right":"✅ I won't go."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Dodanie to po won't.","wrong":"❌ She won't to come.","right":"✅ She won't come."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Zmiana głównego czasownika.","wrong":"❌ He won't works.","right":"✅ He won't work."}]}

{"title":"4. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Przeczenie = subject + will not / won't + V1.","Won't jest takie samo dla wszystkich osób.","Po won't nie używaj to i nie zmieniaj czasownika.","Z be użyj won't be."]}

{"title":"5. Ćwiczenia","select_title":"Ćwiczenie 1. Wybierz poprawne przeczenie","select_intro":"Wybierz poprawną formę Future Simple.","selects":[{"label":"a) He won't come. / b) He won't comes.","prompt":"Która odpowiedź jest poprawna?","answer":"a"},{"label":"a) We will don't wait. / b) We won't wait.","prompt":"Która odpowiedź jest poprawna?","answer":"b"}],"options":["a","b"],"input_title":"Ćwiczenie 2. Utwórz przeczenie","input_intro":"Przepisz z won't.","inputs":[{"before":"She will be late.","after":"→","answer":"She won't be late."},{"before":"They will stay here.","after":"→","answer":"They won't stay here."}]}
